guion_padre.introduccion: Welcome to Lesson 23. Today we will explore some wonderful sounds.
guion_padre.instruccion_m: Point to the big M and say: mmmmmm. Keep the sound going!
guion_padre.instruccion_a: Now point to the big A and say: aaaaaa.

parent_story: Max the monkey ate a sweet apple. Max said: Mmm, this is delicious!
